---
title: "신분당선 강남-신사 연장 개통의 교통·상권 재배치 효과 분석"
author: "DID 분석 보고서"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: false
    fig_caption: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: true
toc-title: "목차"
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=0.85in
mainfont: Apple SD Gothic Neo
monofont: Apple SD Gothic Neo
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \onehalfspacing
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{longtable}
  - \usepackage{array}
  - \usepackage{caption}
  - \usepackage{needspace}
  - \captionsetup[figure]{labelfont=bf,font=small}
  - \captionsetup[table]{labelfont=bf,font=small}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "92%"
)
```

```{r body-report, results='asis'}
report_lines <- readLines("FINAL_REPORT_DRAFT.md", encoding = "UTF-8")
if (length(report_lines) > 0 && startsWith(report_lines[1], "# ")) {
  report_lines <- report_lines[-1]
  if (length(report_lines) > 0 && report_lines[1] == "") {
    report_lines <- report_lines[-1]
  }
}
promote_heading <- function(line) {
  match <- regexpr("^#{2,6} ", line)
  if (match[1] == -1) {
    return(line)
  }
  sub("^#", "", line)
}
report_lines <- vapply(report_lines, promote_heading, character(1))
cat(report_lines, sep = "\n")
```

\newpage

# 그림 부록

```{r fig-dag-identification, fig.cap='DAG 기반 통제변수 선택 구조'}
knitr::include_graphics("control_robustness/figures/dag_identification.png")
```

```{r fig-dag-robustness, fig.cap='DAG 기반 통제변수 robustness DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("control_robustness/figures/did_control_robustness.png")
```

```{r fig-subway-trend, fig.cap='기존 환승·인접역과 통제역의 월별 평균 일일 승하차량 추세'}
knitr::include_graphics("figures/subway_trend_treated_control_2018_2024.png")
```

```{r fig-subway-event, fig.cap='지하철 event-study 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("figures/subway_event_study_2018_2024.png")
```

```{r fig-subway-scm, fig.cap='지하철 synthetic control 결과'}
knitr::include_graphics("figures/subway_scm_2018_2024.png")
```

```{r fig-subway-direction, fig.cap='방향·시간대별 지하철 DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("commute_composition/figures/subway_direction_timeband_effects.png")
```

```{r fig-commerce-three-group, fig.cap='Anchor, secondary corridor, control 상권 매출 추세'}
knitr::include_graphics("anchor_secondary/figures/commerce_three_group_sales_trend.png")
```

```{r fig-commerce-age, fig.cap='Secondary corridor 소비자 구성 DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("commute_composition/figures/commerce_secondary_age_gender_effects.png")
```

```{r fig-bus-corridor, fig.cap='신분당선 corridor 인근 버스 정류장 DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("supplementary_flows/figures/bus_corridor_did_effects.png")
```

```{r fig-living-composition, fig.cap='Secondary corridor 생활인구 구성 DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("supplementary_flows/figures/living_secondary_composition_effects.png")
```

```{r fig-subway-daygroup, fig.cap='요일군별 지하철 DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("supplementary_flows/figures/subway_daygroup_effects.png")
```

```{r fig-gyeonggi-trend, fig.cap='분당구 원 신분당선 corridor와 통제동의 활동인구 추세'}
knitr::include_graphics("gyeonggi_activity/figures/gyeonggi_bundang_activity_trend.png")
```

```{r fig-gyeonggi-did, fig.cap='경기도 API 활동인구 DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("gyeonggi_activity/figures/gyeonggi_bundang_did_effects.png")
```

```{r fig-gyeonggi-dong, fig.cap='원 신분당선 corridor 개별 행정동 활동인구 DID 추정치'}
knitr::include_graphics("gyeonggi_activity/figures/gyeonggi_bundang_single_dong_effects.png")
```
